The proposed framework provides guidance on how to define and apply TBs when releasing government-owned datasets.

method: FLORES-200 parallel sentences define a steering vector as mean_pooled(target_hidden) - mean_pooled(source_hidden) at layer_idx, normalized to unit norm. During generation, alpha * steering_vector is added to the residual stream of that layer via a forward hook. No language instructions appear in the content prompts.
